narration: You started a side hustle to make extra cash — but the IRS has a hidden tax most freelancers never see coming. It hits you before income tax even touches your money.
visual: Dark background. Person silhouette at laptop with dollar signs floating up. Large red warning label fades in: 'HIDDEN TAX'. Red accent color throughout.

narration: At a regular job, your employer pays half your Social Security and Medicare. The moment you work for yourself, you pay both halves — that's a 15.3% self-employment tax on every dollar you earn.
visual: Light background. Two columns: left shows 'W2 JOB' with employer icon and employee icon each paying 7.65%. Right column shows 'SIDE HUSTLE' with one person paying the full 15.3%. Arrow pointing to total.

narration: On eight thousand dollars of side hustle income — the national average — that's twelve hundred and twenty-four dollars in self-employment tax alone. Add income tax and your effective rate can hit thirty-seven percent.
visual: Dark background. Large $8,000 income bar, then two stacked bars: SE tax in red ($1,224) and income tax in orange. Counter animates up to 37%. Text: 'YOUR EFFECTIVE RATE'.

narration: Here's where it gets worse — the IRS wants quarterly payments, not a lump sum in April. Forty-five percent of gig workers miss these deadlines and get hit with penalties on top of the bill.
visual: Light background. Calendar showing four quarters — Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4 — each with a due date stamp. Red 'PENALTY' stamp falls on missed quarters. Clock icon ticking.

narration: Here's the fix most side hustlers miss: you can deduct half that SE tax right on your return. Open a SEP-IRA too — contributions slash your taxable income by up to twenty-five percent of net earnings.
visual: Dark background. Receipt icon for 'SE TAX DEDUCTION' with checkmark. Piggy bank with 'SEP-IRA' label. Green savings bar grows showing tax reduction. Text: 'TWO MOVES THAT SAVE THOUSANDS'.

narration: The one rule that protects every side hustler: set aside thirty percent of every payment the moment it lands. That one habit means the IRS never ambushes you again.
visual: Light background. Money jar being filled — each dollar coin drops in until the jar shows '30%'. Bold text: 'SET ASIDE 30% EVERY TIME'. Pulsing CTA button: FOLLOW FOR MORE.
